rules.name: Material should be assigned to production geometry
rules.why: Unassigned materials are often dead shader networks. Reporting them keeps assets easier to review and prevents stale lookdev nodes from hiding in production scenes.

rules.name: Shading engine should have assigned members
rules.message: Shading engine has no assigned members.
rules.why: Empty shading engines usually indicate dead assignment state or leftover shader network scaffolding. Reporting them helps clean asset shading graphs before publish.

rules.name: Production geometry should not use the default material
rules.message: Production geometry is assigned to the default material.
rules.why: Default material assignments usually mean geometry lost its intended lookdev assignment. Detecting this prevents publishes with unshaded or fallback-looking production geometry.
